brand.name: ODHANI
brand.description: Discover handcrafted ethnic wear that blends timeless tradition with contemporary fashion. Designed for celebrations, crafted for confidence.

about.heading: Where Tradition Meets Modern Grace
about.body: At Odhani, every piece tells a story of heritage, artistry, and femininity. Inspired by India's rich textile culture, our collections are thoughtfully designed for the modern woman who values elegance, comfort, and authenticity.

features.d: Pure silks, fine cottons, hand-loomed weaves.
Embroidery and finishing by master artisans.
Carefully packaged, delivered to your door.

newArrivals.name: Rosé Anarkali
newArrivals.desc: Hand-embroidered chiffon anarkali with delicate zari work and a flowing silhouette.

newArrivals.name: Ivory Zardozi Set
newArrivals.desc: Co-ord set in pure silk with intricate zardozi handwork across the bodice.

newArrivals.name: Maroon Banarasi Kurta
newArrivals.desc: Banarasi silk kurta with gold motif borders, paired with a matching dupatta.

newArrivals.name: Champagne Organza Saree
newArrivals.desc: Lightweight organza saree with hand-painted floral motifs and a satin border.

testimonials.q: The quality and detailing exceeded my expectations. Absolutely stunning.
Odhani perfectly balances tradition and modern fashion.
My festive outfit received endless compliments.
